title: State Transition with Guard Evaluation
content:
API->>API: Check If-Match == action.version
Mismatch → 412 Precondition Failed

API->>DB: SELECT workflow_transition
WHERE from_state=@current AND to_state=@toState
AND workflow_definition_id=action.workflow_id

Note over API: Evaluate 9-guard chain:
[1] Role check
[2] Transition required fields
[3] Compliance required fields
[4] HoC enforcement (min 20 char justification for admin/PPE on high/extreme risk)
[5] Consultation completion (all 'closed')
[6] RCA validation (schema match)
[7] Sub-action dependencies (all terminal)
[8] Verification separation (verifier ≠ actor)
[9] Evidence requirement (min count met)

API->>DB: UPDATE action
SET current_state=@toState, version=version+1
WHERE id=@id AND version=@expected

API->>DB: INSERT state_history + audit_event
(single transaction with UPDATE)
